description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsPeach brassiere, non wired, high coverage, styled with floral lace on the cups, double adjustable hook and eye clasp closure at the back, adjustable straps and side panel along the cups to ensure perfect contouringMaterial and CareCups: 92% nylon and 8% spandexBack: 83% nylon and 7% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
